ddls:
CREATE TABLE "files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the file */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the file */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file (e.g., RequiredFile, Script) */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the file in MB */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the file was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the file was last updated */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the file */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author who created the file */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the file is active */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the file */,
  "license" TEXT /* License of the file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_files_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dependencies" (
  "dependency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dependency */,
  "parent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent file */,
  "child_id" INTEGER /* ID of the child file */,
  "dependency_type" TEXT /* Type of the dependency (e.g., RequiredFile, Script) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the dependency was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the dependency was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dependency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dependencies_parent_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_id") REFERENCES files ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dependencies_child_id FOREIGN KEY ("child_id") REFERENCES files ("file_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Full name of the author */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the author belongs to */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the author (e.g., Developer, Admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the author */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the author */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "file_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* ID of the file */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the file */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the version was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_file_versions_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES files ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_file_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "file_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* ID of the file being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the file */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time the file was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_result" TEXT /* Result of the access (e.g., success, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_file_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_file_access_logs_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES files ("file_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "file_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* ID of the file */,
  "key" TEXT /* Key of the metadata */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the metadata */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the metadata (e.g., string, integer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_file_metadata_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES files ("file_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Developer, Admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time the user last logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_department FOREIGN KEY ("department") REFERENCES user_departments ("department_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "lead_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project lead */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the project (e.g., active, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_lead_id FOREIGN KEY ("lead_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_files" (
  "project_file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project file */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* ID of the file */,
  "assigned_to" INTEGER /* ID of the user assigned to the file */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the file in the project (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date for the file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_files_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_files_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES files ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_files_assigned_to FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_to") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "file_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* ID of the file */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the tag was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_file_tags_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES files ("file_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "change_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each change log */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* ID of the file */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of the change (e.g., update, delete) */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date and time the change was made */,
  "change_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_change_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_change_logs_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES files ("file_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "file_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* ID of the file */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the comment was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_file_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_file_comments_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES files ("file_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "file_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* ID of the file */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the rating */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating of the file (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the rating was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_file_ratings_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES files ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_file_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
